title: Ender Pearl Launcher
description: This mod allows you to use the Ender Pearl without cooldown. It is also expandable with additional enchantments.
body:
This mod adds an **Ender Pearl Launcher** that consumes **Ender Pearl** in the inventory and uses it without cooldown.

Ender Pearl Launcher can enhance its performance with special enchantments, increasing the usability of Ender Pearl.

Compatible with [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)!

English and Japanese are available.


## **🌱How to start**

Ender Pearl Launcher can be obtained by crafting.

![Ender Pearl launcher Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/6gZCwFx.png)

The durability value is 250 and can be repaired with Neatherite Ingot.

Performance can be enhanced with special enchantments.

**Long Range lv1~5**

Projectile velocity increases by 20% with each level.

At the maximum level, Ender Pearl reaches 150 blocks away!

Level 5 cannot be granted at the Enchanting Table, so grant it from the Enchanted Book.

**Safety lv1~5**

Ender Pearl fall damage reduced by 1 with each level.

At level 5, fall damage becomes 0.

**Spare Shot lv1~3**

The probability of not consuming the Ender Pearl increases by 10% with each level.

**Rifling lv1**

Ender Pearl is no longer affected by gravity, but disappears after 3 seconds.

Other than these, **Unbreaking** and **Mending** can be granted.


## Finally

Thank you for reading this far. If you have any problems or requests, please feel free to contact us.

Now, enjoy Ender Pearl Launcher!
